data.name: Baddies, Inc.
data.detailed_description:
After getting taken in by a longtime friend of your family, Judy, you’ve become her last hope to save both her and her struggling farm. Travel to Loho Valley and launch your own dating app startup. But beware, in Loho the competition is ruthless. Everyone is hustling for success, and if you slip up, you might end up as someone else’s stepping stone.

Loho is not only about business opportunities. It is full of gorgeous women looking to unwind, make connections, or just have a little fun. Baddies, Inc. is a choice-driven adult visual novel, featuring:

  • 9000+ high-resolution renders

  • 230+ high-quality animations

  • 20+ hours of gameplay

  • A unique and immersive story where your choices carve your path and its destination

Choices That Matter

Whether you're playing it safe and outdoing your competition by creating a top-notch app or just blowing up their server room, you're the one responsible for your actions; your path is a reflection of your choices. The same goes for your love life. You will have plenty of admirers, but you will need to stay focused on why you came to Loho in the first place. Your choices will shape both your path and your destination!

High-Quality Animations

Dive into interactive, high-quality scenes that put you right in the action.

Switch between POVs, experiment with positions, and enjoy every encounter as its own unique experience. And once unlocked, everything will be available in the gallery for you to view and review whenever you want, as many times as you need.

Lots of Baddies to Meet!

Loho is full of life, and in every corner of the city, you may meet a girl ready to share an adventure:

  • Natalie, your open-minded friend with benefits,

  • Lana, your cute co-worker,

  • Sandy, a Real Estate agent,

  • Kendra, a MILF investor,

  • Boba, the Flower Shop owner,

  • Even your co-worker's mom!

Loho has someone for everyone, and nobody is out of your reach.

Smartwatch and Virtual Companion

Ever wish you could have Loho on your wrist? Meet Lexa, your personal virtual assistant, ready to help you anytime. Unlock features as you progress:

  • Check character profiles and their private portfolios,

  • Browse the internet for business tips or local gossip,

  • Flirt shamelessly with your virtual personal assistant,

If you cannot remember who that hottie you are talking to is, maybe Lexa can remind you in her own revealing way. Browse the web for the latest gossip on Loho Today, or unlock exclusive renders in PhotoHunt by collecting hidden icons during your playthrough!

data.short_description: Baddies, Inc. is an adult visual novel that puts you in control of a rising dating app empire. Flirt, scheme, and uncover the industry’s darkest secrets - while meeting women who could be your next big break… or downfall.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.11+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
